name: Radxa Zero 3E
description: That's a Radxa Zero 3E, the 'overachieving' cousin of the Raspberry Pi Zero. In an FRC context, this is a specialized tool for high-speed edge computing—basically a tiny brain you hide inside the chassis to handle the math that's too hard for the main controller. It’s a Expert target because of its ultra-slim profile and 'forest green' PCB that blends perfectly into the shadows of the wiring mess and the fact that it isn't as well known.
